=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:3-6:23) TS377065: This Effect code uses `console.log`, logging in Effect code is represented through `Effect.log or Logger`. effect(globalConsoleInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for entire file"

[D2] (11:3-11:26) TS377065: This Effect code uses `console.warn`, logging in Effect code is represented through `Effect.logWarning or Logger`. effect(globalConsoleInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for entire file"

[D3] (16:3-16:25) TS377065: This Effect code uses `console.error`, logging in Effect code is represented through `Effect.logError or Logger`. effect(globalConsoleInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for entire file"

[D4] (22:3-22:25) TS377065: This Effect code uses `console.log`, logging in Effect code is represented through `Effect.log or Logger`. effect(globalConsoleInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalConsoleInEffect for entire file"

  (no quick fixes)
